sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n1495" key="a(dro/misqos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἁδρόμισθος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n1495.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">with large prizes</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ἀγῶνες</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0068.tlg001:353" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Scymn.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">353</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
